chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1724 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 30.11.2016. Mr. Khadim Hussain Leghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w SIP Muhammad Hashim Shar of P.S Sarhari District Sanghar and ASI Irshad Ali of P.S Kadhar. = Parawise comments have been filed by the learned State Counsel and while denying the allegations of causing harassment, the police officials have undertaken that they will ensure that petitioner is not harassed by the official respondents and in this regard they will provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law, if they are approached by the petitioner with such a request. It is further directed that private respondents should desist themselves from causing any harassment to the petitioner. The concerned SHO of P.S Kadhar will serve today’s order on private respondents and will submit a compliance report in this regard with the Additional Registrar of this Court within a week from today. With these observations and directions, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
